title: VANTUS SUPERVISOR DASHBOARD
guardrail_text: These contextual indicators are probabilistic patterns, not threat assessments. They provide situational awareness only and should not be used to make operational decisions without additional context.
signals_title_tooltip: Total contextual signals received. Signal count does not indicate risk level.
recent_signal_tooltip: Most recent signal category. Color indicates pattern strength, not risk level. No red colors are used to prevent risk interpretation.
